hypothesis: Augmenting the ∆-learning XGBoost model with metal-centered electronic features derived from single-point GFN1-xTB calculations—specifically d-orbital occupation numbers and local spin moments—will reduce the HSE06 band gap prediction mean absolute error for Cr-, Mn-, Fe-, Co-, and Ni-containing MOFs by at least 30% relative to the current ∆-learning model that uses only stoichiometric, RAC and APRDF descriptors.
